steps.assistant_text: IDENTIFIED: libultra osCartRomInit (cartrominit.c). Broke the documented 'one extra lui' cap — the constant-MMIO-deref-vs-extern-scalar lever: (*(volatile u32*)0xA46...) emits a fresh-temp base per access; extern volatile u32 D_A46xx emits $at-fused stores. %hi relocs landing in non-$at regs in the .s = the source used the IO_WRITE constant form.
